config.rationale: Experiment 5/30 — second attempt to quantify the MTP/NEXTN speedup the user explicitly requested, after the first NEXTN run (7463cc35c921) failed with healthcheck_timeout. Root-cause fix per Rule 11: the previous failure manually set --mamba-scheduler-strategy no_buffer, --speculative-eagle-topk 1, and SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2=1 env var — exactly the flags the rules say "engine auto-handles, do NOT set them manually." This run drops all of those and lets SGLang pick the right defaults; only --speculative-algorithm NEXTN and --speculative-num-steps 3 are set. Holds all other variables identical to the successful SGLang baseline 4eb71ad47b0b (7156 tok/s, TTFT p95 155.8 ms, TPOT p95 10.19 ms): TP=1, max_model_len=65536, dtype=auto, kv_cache_dtype=auto, fcfs, radix cache OFF (matching baseline's --disable-radix-cache), so any throughput/TPOT delta is purely the MTP effect — directly answering the user's "оцени какой прирост даст MTP" question. mem_fraction_static=0.8 per the user's suggested command (SGLang will auto-bump to 0.9 for NEXTN's draft KV cache buffers). Kept context at 65536 instead of the user's 262144 because (a) baseline was at 65536 so the comparison stays apples-to-apples, and (b) NEXTN adds verifier/draft buffers — pushing to 262144 risks OOM and would muddle the MTP-attribution signal. If this run succeeds, future experiments can extend context and layer in fp8/chunked prefill. Not setting --speculative-num-draft-tokens explicitly — letting SGLang auto-derive it from num_steps=3 to avoid the prior incompatibility.

llm_commentary: Experiment 2acdc9c1d533 failed outright — status=failed with zero throughput, zero TTFT, and all smoke tests false, so it contributes nothing to throughput, latency, or balanced goals. This is the second consecutive NEXTN/MTP attempt to fail on SGLang; even after dropping the manually-set spec-v2 flags, the engine still didn't come up healthy, suggesting NEXTN on this model/version may need a different combination (e.g., explicit draft-token count, radix cache enabled, or a different speculative algorithm) or simply isn't viable here. The vLLM baseline (8e036532f8f1, ~7098 tok/s @ 45.6ms TTFT) remains the dominant Pareto point on all three axes.
docker_command: docker run --name bench-sglang-2acdc9c1d533 --gpus all --shm-size 16g --network host -v /root/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface -d -e SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2=1 lmsysorg/sglang:latest python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --tp-size 1 --dtype auto --enable-metrics --mem-fraction-static 0.9 --context-length 65536 --disable-radix-cache --mamba-scheduler-strategy no_buffer --speculative-eagle-topk 1 --speculative-algorithm NEXTN --speculative-num-steps 3 --reasoning-parser qwen3 --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder
